action.reasoning: Observation: feat index is (datetime, instrument), label index is (instrument, datetime) — different ordering. concat axis=1 fails to align properly because of different index level order, dropping all rows. Decision: swap label index levels to match, or reset and re-index. Fix predict.py and re-evaluate.
